name: axiclick
description: AXI-compliant macOS mouse, keyboard, and screen automation for AI agents

scripts.postinstall: swiftc -O lib/scroll-helper.swift -o lib/scroll-helper 2>/dev/null || true; swiftc -O lib/ax-helper.swift -o lib/ax-helper 2>/dev/null || true; swiftc -O lib/ocr-helper.swift -o lib/ocr-helper 2>/dev/null || true; swiftc -O lib/swipe-helper.swift -o lib/swipe-helper 2>/dev/null || true; swiftc -O lib/display-helper.swift -o lib/display-helper 2>/dev/null || true
